description_long: This is a weathered, cylindrical yellow metal barrel with visible rust and grime, suggesting prolonged outdoor exposure. The barrel features two prominent horizontal reinforcement bands and a radioactive warning symbol stenciled on its side. A large black liquid stain is seen leaking from a puncture or opening on the top, running down the side, indicating hazardous contents. The surface is mottled with patches of rust, dirt, and discoloration, giving it a distressed, industrial look. The top appears to be sealed, with no visible removable lid, and there are no handles or grips present. This type of barrel is commonly used for storing or transporting dangerous chemicals or waste in industrial or urban environments.
description: A rusty yellow metal barrel with a radioactive warning symbol and a black liquid leak on top, showing heavy wear and industrial use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the radioactive symbol and a prominent black liquid leak running down from the top.
description_view_1: Side view with no visible markings, but the black liquid leak is visible on the top edge.
description_view_2: Rear view with no symbols or leaks visible, only rust and weathering.
description_view_3: Side view with the radioactive symbol visible, and the black liquid leak just visible on the top edge.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: metal hoops at top and bottom
